title: Story Options — 4 narrative directions (Phase B / node 3)
description: Contract for analysis/story_options.json. The AI proposes FOUR distinct ways to tell this couple's story, judged from the aggregate photo-content profile (NOT the raw images). Emotion/story only — NO effect or transition names appear here (those are decided later in director_notes). The scaffold computes the deterministic `profile` and owns option ids A..D; the model only fills the qualitative fields, which the guardrail trims and enum-clamps.

generatedBy.description: 'stub' until the DeepSeek text call is keyed, else 'text:deepseek/<model>'.

profile.description: Deterministic aggregate of analysis/photo_content.json the scaffold computed and fed the model (provenance + the numbers the AI was NOT allowed to invent).

recommended.description: Default pick if the client does not choose (node 4). The scaffold sets this to the first option; the model is asked to order options best-fit-first.

id.description: Assigned by the scaffold in order — not trusted from the model.

title.description: Short marketing-style name, e.g. 'Luxury Wedding Film'.

mood.description: Emotional tone in a few words.

pacing.description: Overall rhythm; a qualitative choice, not a duration.

emotionalArc.description: How feeling should build across the film.

summary.description: One or two sentences on the storytelling approach — emotion/narrative only, no engine terms.

captionTone.description: Optional: voice of the on-screen text (minimal, poetic, warm...).

fitReason.description: Optional: why this direction suits THIS photo set (references the profile).
